headline: Backlinks · profile mapped, cleanup queued
standfirst: Two-month engagement view of the cmsfinancial.ae backlink profile. 529 referring domains carry 4.8K backlinks. The picture is quantity-rich and quality-poor: 87% of referring domains sit at Authority Score 0–10, the largest single referring domain (frycu.com, 2,177 backlinks) shares the same Hetzner IP as cmsfinancial.ae itself, and 24% of links are nofollow. This chapter is the prerequisite work for Task 24 (Backlink audit + HSTS support fix + security review). The audit identified what gets disavowed, what gets kept, and what gets pursued — chapter 06 carries the active campaign.
summary_lead: The backlink profile needs cleanup before it needs growth. 87% of 529 referring domains carry an Authority Score under 10, including the largest single source — frycu.com (2,177 backlinks) — which shares cmsfinancial.ae's own server IP. The cleanup list (Task 24 deliverable) flags ~60 likely PBN/spam domains for disavow filing. Healthy backlinks: link to /, /careers/, /regulation/ from MoneyExpoIndia, BrokerSome, fxverify, cashbackforex — keep these.

win_tiles.label: Referring domains
win_tiles.tip: Unique domains with at least one backlink to cmsfinancial.ae. Volume is healthy in raw terms but the quality distribution is heavily skewed low — 87% sit at AS 0–10.

win_tiles.label: Total backlinks
win_tiles.tip: Total backlinks dropped 5% over the period. That's natural decay from links going stale, not a sign of lost wins. No new RDs acquired yet.

win_tiles.label: Dofollow link share
win_tiles.tip: Three-quarters of backlinks pass authority. 24% nofollow is industry-typical for an organic profile not built through paid placements.

win_tiles.label: AS 0–10 share
win_tiles.tip: 464 of 529 referring domains carry Semrush Authority Score under 10. These contribute almost nothing to ranking. Lifting the median is what link-building solves.

win_tiles.label: RD-to-IP concentration
win_tiles.tip: 529 referring domains share only 246 unique IPs and 204 subnets. The ratio (2.15 RDs per IP) is high — multiple domains live on the same server, a classic PBN signature. Major disavow target.

win_tiles.label: Disavow candidates flagged
win_tiles.tip: Audit identified roughly 60 referring domains for disavow filing: shared-IP clusters, off-topic adult/casino, broken or recycled domains. List ready to submit through GSC.

top_anchors.note: Image links with no alt text. Audit + fix where we own the source.
Raw URL — typical for citations and footers.
Anchor text is OUR top RD's own domain — suspicious. Investigate.
Anchor is another RD's domain. Cluster signal.

top_referring_domains.note: Largest single source. Shares server IP with the site. Almost certainly self-cluster / PBN. Disavow.
Investigate relevance — DE host, broker-unrelated TLD use.
Possible legit broker-niche directory. Confirm and decide.

tld_split.note: Gap — no government or education citations yet.

top_backlinked_pages.note: HTTP variant — redirect chain target for the HSTS fix below

deliverables.title: Tasks 22-24 outputs from this chapter
deliverables.subtitle: What the backlink audit produces, beyond the raw read

rows.why: 60 candidate RDs flagged: frycu.com cluster (shared Hetzner IP), low-AS Moldova/India spam, off-topic recycled domains. Disavow .txt ready to upload via GSC's Disavow Tool.
2 backlinks point at http://cmsfinancial.ae and http://www.cmsfinancial.ae. Fix: enforce HSTS on the server so HTTP → HTTPS redirect chain is one hop, not two, preserving link equity.

23 high-priority editorial outreach targets identified — UAE regulator portals (CMA, DED, SCA), broker comparison sites (BrokerChooser, ForexBrokers, Investopedia), GCC business media (Khaleej Times, Gulf News, The National). Pursued in chapter 06.

prose.title: What the profile actually looks like.
paragraphs: The headline number is misleading. 529 referring domains sounds healthy, but 87% of them sit at Authority Score 0–10 — Semrush's bottom rung, contributing almost nothing to ranking. The actual editorial-grade RD count (AS 30+) is closer to 32 domains.

The frycu.com signal. Top single referring domain is frycu.com, with 2,177 backlinks pointing at cmsfinancial.ae. The frycu.com server IP is 159.69.137.161 — the same Hetzner IP that hosts cmsfinancial.ae. Same operator, same network, self-reference. Almost certainly a PBN or staging artifact. Goes onto the disavow.

Two healthy patterns to preserve. The brand homepage and /regulation/ page hold 362 + 33 unique referring domains respectively. Citations come from legitimate forex-niche portals (BrokerSome, fxverify, cashbackforex, MoneyExpoIndia). Keep these, build more like them — that's the chapter 06 playbook.
